parent_nodes.title: Surface PRD next-command handoff on the PRD issue
parent_nodes.completion_condition: All child leaf nodes are completed, deferred, or linked as follow-up, and the durable decision is captured before closeout.

leaf_nodes.title: Confirm current PRD handoff behavior and exact missing user-facing next command
leaf_nodes.commit_intent: Record the observed product gap and target behavior before implementation.
notes: Issue #7 reports a real dogfood gap from jununfly/ZCodeGraph#678: the next implementation command was visible in local triage state, but not on the PRD issue that serves as the handoff object.
Current Daily Triage workflow writes zj-loop/STATE.md and CI route evidence; it does not scan PRD issues or emit PRD next-command handoff comments.
Current issue-backlog-triage flow recommends triage transitions and can create an independent Issue Fix Request after maintainer confirmation; it does not define a PRD handoff comment protocol.

The implementation target should preserve report-only defaults by producing an exact manual gh issue comment command when issue comments are disabled, and only writing a PRD issue comment when an explicit comment mode is enabled.
The handoff comment needs a deterministic marker and stable body shape so repeated runs can skip or update instead of spamming.
verification_evidence: rg "next command|next-command|handoff|PRD|prd|zj-to-prd|to-prd|Issue Fix Request|roadmap-sliced-development|confirm-triage-transition" -n README.md README.zh-CN.md docs patterns scripts tools .github zj-loop

leaf_nodes.title: Implement deterministic PRD issue next-command handoff surfacing
leaf_nodes.commit_intent: Expose the next command in the appropriate PRD issue flow without broadening report-only defaults.

leaf_nodes.title: Verify the issue-backlog-triage to roadmap activation dogfood chain and document evidence
leaf_nodes.commit_intent: Prove the route chain remains replayable and side-effect boundaries are clear.

closeout.post_merge_branch_cleanup: delete merged roadmap branch by default
closeout.carrier_issue_cleanup: post-merge closeout may close only #70 if the PR contract is present and guards pass
